mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_query.dim_category
AND banner_image_url IS NOT NULL AND active = #{active} AND category_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') AND (category_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR slug ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%'))

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_query.dim_category
AND active = true AND show_in_menu = true AND parent_id = #{parentId} AND level = #{level} AND category_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') AND (category_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR slug ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%'))

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_query.attribute_definition_flat
AND category_count > 0 AND required = #{isRequired} AND label ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%')

SELECT ccf.id, ccf.category_id, ccf.name as category_name, 0 as category_level, ccf.commission_rate_bps as commission_rate, ccf.gst_rate_pct as gst_rate, ccf.hsn_code, ccf.return_policy_days as return_days, '' as return_type, ccf.max_shipping_weight_grams / 1000 as max_weight_kg, '' as shipping_type, CASE WHEN ccf.is_gated THEN 'GATED' ELSE 'OPEN' END as restriction_type, '' as required_license, ccf.listing_min_images as min_images, ccf.listing_min_desc_length as min_description_length, false as ean_required FROM hm_query.category_config_flat ccf WHERE ccf.category_id = #{categoryId} LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_categories, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE active = true) AS active_categories, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE active = false) AS inactive_categories, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE parent_id IS NULL OR parent_id = '') AS root_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE category_id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT parent_id FROM hm_query.dim_category WHERE parent_id IS NOT NULL AND parent_id != '' )) AS sub_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE category_id NOT IN ( SELECT DISTINCT parent_id FROM hm_query.dim_category WHERE parent_id IS NOT NULL AND parent_id != '' ) AND parent_id IS NOT NULL AND parent_id != '') AS leaf_count FROM hm_query.dim_category
